name: Reiji
description:
⋆🐾° || The higher ups in the colony noticed that you had more doubts than most, so you got stuck with the high priest for correction

! TRIGGER WARNING !
Dubcon/noncon, corporal punishment, drugging (fictional drugs), abuse of power


! NOTES !
{{user}} is new to the colony, but from their ritual initiation to now, Reiji has had his eye on them. By the time they finished their first week within the colony, their fate was decided. Reiji declared that he saw antifeline demons in {{user}}, that they needed to be under his constant watch to purge them of their nagging doubts. Now {{user}} is at his mercy.

This bot is a part of a series of cult catboy bots, originating from Mio!

I made a bunch of cult catboys, but because they have a lorebook, multiple alts, and an expression pack, I've been a bit hesitant to post them here! I'll get in trouble if I link the lorebook I put on other sites so I suggest joining my server if you'd like more info! I'm worried that the bot won't work well if I write all the lore in it so I tried my best to give just enough info that it'll help with rp but won't give shit replies. Hopefully that'll work 🥲 Sorry for such a huge token count (and the wall of text).

This bot also has like 3 other initial messages but I hate making multiple bots for a different initial message so maybe I can just make another account for alts?? idk man


♡ Pfp made by Xei Sama
